title: ChargePoint Holdings, Inc. (CHPT) Analyst Ratings and Estimates
text: ChargePoint Holdings CHPT Stock Forecast and Price Targets. According to 8 analysts, ChargePoint Holdings CHPT has a Hold consensus rating as of April 2026. 13% of analysts recommend a Strong Buy, 0% recommend Buy, 63% suggest Holding, 13% advise Selling, and 13% predict a Strong Sell. Analyst price targets vary depending on the source and timeframe. ChargePoint Holdings Inc has a consensus price target of $5.86 based on the ratings of 26 analysts. The 9 analysts that cover ChargePoint Holdings stock have a consensus rating of Hold and an average price target of $9.67, which forecasts a 41.17% increase in the stock price over the next year. The high is $20 issued by Benchmark on September 5, 2025. The low is $0.65 issued by UBS on April 17, 2025. ChargePoint Holdings Inc is facing a negative outlook primarily due to its stagnant hardware gross margin, remaining steady at approximately 8%, which raises concerns about profitability.
